title: March 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 17''' is the 76th day of the year (77th in leap years). There are 289 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1936|1936]] – [[Patty Maloney]] is born.
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Paul Kantner]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Mark Boone Junior]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Arye Gross]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Victor McGuire]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Ben Cooke]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[John Boyega]] is born.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 4|''Star Wars'' (1998) 4]] published.
*1999 – [[Vader's Quest 2|''Vader's Quest'' 2]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 62|''Republic'' 62]] published.
*[[2006]] – "[[Slaying Dragons]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] [[Fiction]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Larry Drake]] dies.
*[[2019]] – "[[No Escape: Part 2]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 13: Rogues and Rebels]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: Expanded Edition]]'' published by [[Del Rey]] in the U.S.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars Insider 201|''Star Wars Insider'' 201]] published.
*2021 – [[Bounty Hunters 10|''Bounty Hunters'' 10]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Hyperspace Stories: Grievous]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Empire Omnibus Vol. 4]]'' to be published.
<noinclude>
